name: compliance source contract validator rejects a duplicate source id within the same registry file
command:
mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && printf 'sources:
  - {id: dup, name: x, url: x, authoritative_publisher: x, jurisdiction: x, applicable_to: [x], identifier_scheme: x, fetch_frequency: weekly, legal_review_required: false, paywalled: false, why_authoritative: "a
b
c"}
  - {id: dup, name: y, url: y, authoritative_publisher: y, jurisdiction: y, applicable_to: [y], identifier_scheme: y, fetch_frequency: weekly, legal_review_required: false, paywalled: false, why_authoritative: "a
b
c"}
' > .claude-tdd-pro/COMPLIANCE-URLS.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/validate-source-contract.sh" --registry .claude-tdd-pro/COMPLIANCE-URLS.yaml 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'duplicate_id=dup' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
